_comment: Canonical flag registry v3. blade_legacy replaces weapon_legacy + blade_fate. ending_route is set by evaluateEnding() at Ch13 start and never written by chapter content.

flags.label: Ruthless
flags.description: Force, intimidation, and immediate cost over diplomacy. High values contribute to Bad ending gate.

flags.label: Political
flags.description: Leverage, patience, and institutional power. Contributes to IF ending gate (>=4).

flags.label: Mitsuhide Loyalty
flags.description: Accumulated loyalty delta. Bad ending gate (<=0). IF ending gate (>=4). Critical for Ch13 S02 variant.

flags.label: Bond
flags.description: Treating companions as people, not tools. IF ending gate (>=5). Affects narrator beats in Ch6, Ch13.

flags.label: Nohime Trust
flags.description: Accumulated trust with Nohime. IF ending gate (>=4). Affects Ch13 Standard epilogue if >=3.

flags.label: Ieyasu Trust
flags.description: Trust with Tokugawa Ieyasu. IF ending gate (>=3). Ieyasu's response at Ch10 Anegawa.

flags.label: Katsuie Loyalty
flags.description: Loyalty of Shibata Katsuie. IF ending gate (>=3). He holds the outer wall at Honnoji if met.

flags.label: Supernatural
flags.description: Engagement with omen and fate. Mythic ending gate (>=4). Affects Mythic Standard epilogue variant.

flags.label: Omen Read
flags.description: Paying attention to things outside the campaign. Mythic ending gate (>=4). Affects Ch12 S07 fox response and Ch13 S01 opening.

flags.label: Blade Legacy
flags.description: Hard-set progression 0-3. 0=travels light, 1=destroyed blade, 2=kept original, 3=reforged. Mythic ending gate (==3). Gates Ch12 monk revelation (4 variants). One IF epilogue line if ==3.

flags.label: Kenshin Verdict
flags.description: How Kenshin assessed Nobunaga over time. 0=cold dismissal, 1-2=reluctant respect, 3+=genuine belief. Affects Ch12 posthumous letter (3 variants). One conditional line in every Ch13 ending epilogue.

flags.label: Mino Resolved
flags.description: How Dosan's promise was fulfilled. 2=low casualties with Nohime involved, 0=scorched earth. Used in Ch11 Mitsuhide moral argument. Affects Standard epilogue if ==2 and nohime_trust>=3.

flags.label: Kennyo Enmity
flags.description: Escalation of the Nobunaga/Kennyo conflict. Affects Ch11 Kennyo's final letter (3 variants). If >=5, Kennyo's monks appear in Bad ending at Honnoji.

flags.label: Ch7 Road Cleared
flags.description: Tracks whether the Kyoto gate road was cleared on the first push in Ch7. Used for conditional epilogue text in Ch7 S10.

flags.label: Ending Route
flags.description: Set exclusively by evaluateEnding() at Ch13 S01 entry. -1=not evaluated, 0=Bad, 1=IF, 2=Mythic, 3=Standard. Never written by chapter content.
